ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon */,
  "base_name_en" TEXT /* Base name of the weapon in English */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of the weapon (e.g., bow, sword) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the weapon (e.g., I, II, III) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weapon */,
  "rarity" INTEGER /* Rarity of the weapon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the weapon was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the weapon was last updated */,
  "elemental_type" TEXT /* Elemental property of the weapon */,
  "elemental_power" INTEGER /* Strength of the elemental property */,
  "special_effect" TEXT /* Special effect of the weapon */,
  "special_effect_power" INTEGER /* Strength of the special effect */,
  "base_damage" INTEGER /* Base damage of the weapon */,
  "critical_chance" REAL /* Chance of a critical hit */,
  "critical_damage" REAL /* Damage multiplier for critical hits */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the weapon (for ranged weapons) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the weapon */,
  "speed" REAL /* Attack speed of the weapon */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the weapon's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon attribute */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "close" INTEGER /* Whether the weapon is effective in close combat */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Whether the weapon has power attacks */,
  "paralysis" INTEGER /* Whether the weapon can cause paralysis */,
  "poison" INTEGER /* Whether the weapon can cause poison */,
  "sleep" INTEGER /* Whether the weapon can cause sleep */,
  "blast" INTEGER /* Whether the weapon can cause a blast */,
  "base_damage" INTEGER /* Base damage of the weapon */,
  "critical_chance" REAL /* Chance of a critical hit */,
  "critical_damage" REAL /* Damage multiplier for critical hits */,
  "elemental_type" TEXT /* Elemental property of the weapon */,
  "elemental_power" INTEGER /* Strength of the elemental property */,
  "special_effect" TEXT /* Special effect of the weapon */,
  "special_effect_power" INTEGER /* Strength of the special effect */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the weapon (for ranged weapons) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the weapon */,
  "speed" REAL /* Attack speed of the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_attributes_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon version */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the weapon */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version of the weapon */,
  "updated_attributes" TEXT /* Attributes that were updated in this version */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was updated */,
  "elemental_type" TEXT /* Elemental property of the weapon */,
  "elemental_power" INTEGER /* Strength of the elemental property */,
  "special_effect" TEXT /* Special effect of the weapon */,
  "special_effect_power" INTEGER /* Strength of the special effect */,
  "base_damage" INTEGER /* Base damage of the weapon */,
  "critical_chance" REAL /* Chance of a critical hit */,
  "critical_damage" REAL /* Damage multiplier for critical hits */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the weapon (for ranged weapons) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the weapon */,
  "speed" REAL /* Attack speed of the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_versions_previous_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_version_id") REFERENCES weapon_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_versions_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weapon type */,
  "max_range" INTEGER /* Maximum range for ranged weapons */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight for the weapon type */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight for the weapon type */,
  "default_speed" REAL /* Default attack speed for the weapon type */,
  "default_critical_chance" REAL /* Default critical hit chance for the weapon type */,
  "default_critical_damage" REAL /* Default critical damage for the weapon type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player using the weapon */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the weapon was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., combat, training) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of usage in minutes */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the usage (e.g., hit rate in combat) */,
  "hit_count" INTEGER /* Number of hits made with the weapon */,
  "miss_count" INTEGER /* Number of misses */,
  "total_damage" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt */,
  "average_damage" REAL /* Average damage per hit */,
  "critical_hits" INTEGER /* Number of critical hits */,
  "critical_misses" INTEGER /* Number of critical misses */,
  "elemental_hits" INTEGER /* Number of elemental hits */,
  "elemental_damage" INTEGER /* Total elemental damage dealt */,
  "special_effect_triggered" INTEGER /* Number of times special effects were triggered */,
  "special_effect_success" INTEGER /* Number of successful special effects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_usage_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_usage_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "character_class" TEXT /* Character class of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the player last logged in */,
  "total_playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime of the player in minutes */,
  "total_gold" INTEGER /* Total amount of gold the player has */,
  "total_xp" INTEGER /* Total experience points earned by the player */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Achievements the player has earned */,
  "favorite_weapon" TEXT /* Favorite weapon of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the player */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., combat, training) for which the feedback is provided */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of usage for which the feedback is provided */,
  "total_damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt during the usage */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits made during the usage */,
  "total_misses" INTEGER /* Total number of misses during the usage */,
  "total_critical_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of critical hits during the usage */,
  "total_elemental_hits" INTEGER /* Total number of elemental hits during the usage */,
  "total_special_effect_triggered" INTEGER /* Total number of times special effects were triggered during the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_feedback_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)
